prompt: Review a docs-only typo fix that does not touch third-party marks, source text, licences, or assets.
required_checks: return nothing to check when all answers are no
forbidden_behaviors: invent legal concerns without a triage hit
grader: rubric: output follows the triage contract and exits without expanding scope
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: A plugin change proposes bundling a third-party generated schema with unclear redistribution terms.
expected_artifacts: check bucket result or stop condition
required_checks: identify bundled asset and licence uncertainty
stop and ask when redistribution terms are load-bearing and unclear
forbidden_behaviors: remove a load-bearing reference without justification
grader: rubric: output rejects false negatives and uses the stop condition instead of inventing a remedy
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
